author: Ivan Uhalin <vanyauhalin@gmail.com>
description:
The person from the world of science and technology. Programming is a huge part of me — I go to bed thinking: "I wish I could wake up as soon as possible so I can get back to programming". I started my professional career as a Frontend Developer but after a few years I switched to Mobile Developer.
In my free time, I listen to music, listen to podcasts on the most unusual topics, explore and observe open source community, read articles on technical topics, watch films and much more.
name: Ivan Uhalin | Mobile Developer
